title: Iron Mountain Incorporated (IRM) Presents at 6th Annual Wells Fargo TMT Summit (Transcript)
text: Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE:IRM ) 6th Annual Virtual Wells Fargo TMT Summit November 29, 2022 1:40 PM ET Company Participants Barry Hytinen - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Eric Luebchow - Wells Fargo Securities Eric Luebchow All right. So good morning, everyone.

title: Iron Mountain: Record Quarter, Well-Covered 5% Yield
text: Iron Mountain yields 4.67%, with an improved 66% AFFO Dividend Payout Ratio. It continues to have strong earnings growth in 2022.

title: Iron Mountain to Participate in Wells Fargo 2022 TMT Summit
text: BOSTON--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE: IRM), a global leader in innovative storage, data center infrastructure, asset lifecycle management and information management services, today announced that Barry Hytinen, Executive Vice President & CFO will present at the Wells Fargo 2022 TMT Summit in Las Vegas on Tuesday, November 29, 2022 at 10:40 am PT (1:40 pm ET).

title: Iron Mountain: Aggressively Expanding Data Center Capacity
text: Iron Mountain Incorporated has acquired XData Properties, providing the company with a data center park in Madrid, Spain. Iron Mountain purchased a 10-acre parcel of land in Pheonix, Arizona, to develop a data center park with an expected power capacity of 36MW.

title: Iron Mountain (IRM) Boosts Presence in EMEA and North America
text: Iron Mountain (IRM) expands into the EMEA region by acquiring XData Properties in Madrid. It also buys a land parcel in Phoenix, AZ, one of North America's leading data center markets.

title: Iron Mountain Incorporated (IRM) Presents at J.P. Morgan Ultimate Services Investor Conference Transcript
text: Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE:IRM ) J.P. Morgan Ultimate Services Investor Conference Call November 17, 2022 9:10 AM ET Company Participants Bill Meaney - President and Chief Executive Officer Barry Hytinen - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Alex Hess - JPMorgan Alex Hess Good morning.

title: Iron Mountain Data Centers Expands Footprint in North America
text: BOSTON--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Iron Mountain (NYSE: IRM), the global leader in innovative storage, data center infrastructure, asset lifecycle management and information management services, has expanded their North American data center footprint with the purchase of a 10 acre land parcel and 50+ MVA (expandable to 100+ MVA) substation in Phoenix, Arizona to develop a 36 megawatt, 230K square foot data center (AZP3). The land is adjacent to Iron Mountain's existing 39-acre campus that houses their AZP1 (41 megawatt) and AZP2 (48 megawatt) data centers. Phase one of the AZP3 expansion is expected to be delivered in 2024.

title: Iron Mountain Data Centers Expands EMEA Footprint
text: BOSTON--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Iron Mountain (NYSE: IRM), the global leader in innovative storage, data center infrastructure, asset lifecycle management and information management services, has expanded their data center footprint through the acquisition of XData Properties, one of the largest data center parks in Madrid. The property has enough power secured to eventually develop 79 megawatts in the coming years. In addition to the existing three megawatt data center on site, the first 20 megawatt data center is planned with a 2024 completion date.

title: Iron Mountain to Participate in J.P. Morgan Ultimate Services Investor Conference
text: BOSTON--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE: IRM), a global leader in innovative storage, data center infrastructure, asset lifecycle management and information management services, today announced that William Meaney, President & CEO and Barry Hytinen, Executive Vice President & CFO will present at the J.P. Morgan Ultimate Services Investor Conference in New York City on Thursday, November 17th at 9:10 am ET.

title: Bert's October Dividend Income Summary
text: We received $801.63 in October dividend income. This was the first quarter we received a dividend from Vanguard's S&P 500 Index fund (VOO).

title: Iron Mountain (IRM) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE:IRM ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 3, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Bill Meany - President, Chief Executive Officer Barry Hytinen - Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer Gillian Tiltman - Senior Vice President, Head of Investor Relations Conference Call Participants Shlomo Rosenbaum - Stifel Kevin McVeigh - Credit Suisse George Tong - Goldman Sachs Eric Luebchow - Wells Fargo Wendy Ma - Evercore Andrew Steinerman - JP Morgan Brendan Lynch - Barclays Operator Good morning and welcome to the Iron Mountain third quarter 2022 earnings conference call. All participants will be in listen-only mode.

title: Iron Mountain's (IRM) Q3 AFFO Beats, Revenues Increase Y/Y
text: Iron Mountain's (IRM) third-quarter top line grows year over year, driven by the solid performance of the storage and service segments, and the data-center business. It reaffirms its 2022 guidance.

title: Iron Mountain (IRM) Q3 FFO Surpass Estimates
text: Iron Mountain (IRM) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 2.08% and 2.23%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Iron Mountain Reports Third Quarter Results
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE: IRM), a global leader in innovative storage, data center infrastructure, asset lifecycle management and information management services, announces record financial and operating results for the third quarter of 2022.
